pi_items.source: Code analysis: task.json metadata, task description (line 2), setup_task.sh (line 90 in privacy_request.txt), verifier.py (line 62 checks for 'redacted')

Code analysis: task.json metadata, task description mentions 'User-[ID]' and 'User-Anonymized', setup_task.sh (line 91 states: Change Last Name to "User-$PERSON_ID" or "User-Anonymized"), verifier.py (lines 73-74 checks for 'user-' or 'user-anonymized' in last_name.lower())
Code analysis: task description states '~/Documents/privacy_request.txt', setup_task.sh (line 76 creates file at '/home/ga/Documents/privacy_request.txt'), metadata confirms exact path

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Person record named 'Marcus PII-Holder' with email marcus.holder@example.com and phone 555-019-2834 in the ArkCase system via API. The agent must anonymize this record by changing the first name to 'Redacted', changing the last name to 'User-[SystemID]' or 'User-Anonymized', and clearing email and phone fields. A privacy request document is created at /home/ga/Documents/privacy_request.txt containing instructions for the anonymization. ArkCase is a real, open-source case management platform.
